title: centaurea × beckiana
intro: Centaurea × beckiana, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is a hybrid of Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea montana. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cornflower include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, as well as promoting wound healing and soothing skin irritations. Cornflower can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
